Roobet Games: Your guide to playing unique Roobet games

When you’re looking for fun, exclusive crypto casino games with a twist that keeps the mechanics simple, Roobet games are for you. In this platform, you get in-house original online casino games based on popular games like dice, coin flip, and mines. These games have been reimagined while keeping the focus on fast and simple gameplay, making it even more accessible for players all over the world on this website. Learn more about Roobet Originals games when you read this guide!

What are Roobet Originals?

To elevate player experience, Roobet has created exclusive house games that add a fun twist to popular casino games. These innovative Roobet Originals games take betting to the next level with easy game mechanics, fast gameplay, and transparency through provably fair mechanics that you can verify yourself. Moreover, these games’ foundations are based in Random Number Generator (RNG), ensuring completely random and unbiased results. Take a chance to boost your betting experience now by trying Roobet gambling games!

Types of Roobet Original Games

Roobet’s house games elevate the usual classic games like Crash, Mines, Plinko and more into game variations that keep the focus on three features: simplicity, fun, and quick gameplay. To get started now on a fun and unique betting experience, check out the unique Roobet games list below:

Roobet Crash

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $1,000,000

Playing Roobet Crash is simple since the goal is to cash-out of the game before the rocket crashes. With the game’s design, once you place your bet, the rocket will continue increasing on the screen, reaching bigger multipliers the higher it goes.

To get an idea of what your potential win is, you multiply the multiplier by your bet. Besides that, there are two multipliers you need to note here:

  • Multiplier column on the right: This column shows the rise of the multipliers over the duration of the game.
  • Multiplier column below: These multipliers are indicated by green and red colours at the bottom of the game. This is the history of the game that players can easily check to spot trends, as you can see below:
    • A red multiplier means the rocket crashed between 00x and 1.99. If you see a string of red, it means the house is currently on a winning streak against players who crashed out to more than that.
    • A green multiplier is one above 00x, which means players have doubled their bet.

Roobet Keno

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $3,000,000

If you want to play a simple game similar to the lottery, then draw your chances now at Roobet’s Keno. Here, you can predict which numbers will appear on the board between 1 and 40. However, unlike the lottery, the minimum number of picks you can make here is 1 to 10. Additionally, you can check the odds of winning based on the risk levels, number of picks, and your potential payout when you hover over the multiplier gemstones at the bottom of the game if you get those multipliers.

Roobet Mission Uncrossable

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $3,000,000

Want to take your chance by letting a chicken cross the road safely? Play Roobet’s Mission Uncrossable now, a twist to the classic chicken game where multipliers can be found in each lane. The more lanes you reach, the higher the potential win is! But be careful of the moving cars that might hit the chicken, since if they hit you, it’s game over.

In this obstacle game, you can adjust the difficulty levels to safely cross the road. However, the chance of collision with a car increases per level, as you can see:

  • Easy: 4%
  • Medium: 12%
  • Hard: 20%
  • Daredevil: 40%

Roobet Mines

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $3,000,000

One of the best Roobet Originals games is Roobet Mines, since all you need to do here is take your chance on the grid to uncover multipliers for your bet. However, be careful in this Mines game since there are hidden bombs on the tiles that will end the round if you uncover them and make you lose. In short, to win here, you need to carefully uncover the tiles and cash out before you discover a bomb.

Additionally, here are other interesting features of this game:

  • Grid size: If you want to make your game more fun and potentially increase your probability of winning, you can change the number of tiles in the game to 25, 36, 49, or 64.
  • Mines: Similar to the grid size, you can increase the number of bombs per tile to 4, 15, 25, or 35. You can also customise the number, with a minimum of 1 and a maximum equal to your chosen grid size subtracted by 1. For example, if you have 25 tiles, the maximum number of bombs is 24.

Roobet Dice

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $3,000,000

The Roobet Dice game adds a twist to the usual game since you can choose if the number will appear lower, between, or higher than expected. This means you have to choose the numbers in the given range of 0 to 100 and game bet options below:

  • Roll Under: You predict the result to be lower than the number you chose to win.
  • Roll Over: You predict the result to be higher than the number you chose to win.
  • Roll Between: You choose two numbers, and you win if the result falls between them.
  • Roll Outside: You choose your range and predict that the result will be outside of that range to win.
  • Roll Between x2: You choose two sets of numbers and predict that the results will fall in either of these two bets to win.

Roobet Plinko

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $10,000

Max. profit - $500,000

Roobet Plinko is a drop ball game of chance with different multipliers located at the bottom. It’s a fast-paced game where the goal is to potentially land the multipliers on the far left or right since they usually have the highest multipliers. The multipliers located in the middle are lower and depending on which one you get can return less than your original wager.

There’s a demo that allows you to try it first, but if you’re ready to play the game, choose your bet amount and select any of the game modes:

  • Low: Multipliers range from 0.5x to 16x
  • Medium: Multipliers range from 0.3x to 110x
  • High: Multipliers range from 0.2x to 1,000x
  • Lightning: There are multipliers in the pathways that the ball can potentially acquire before reaching the bottom. Besides that, the multipliers at the bottom can reach up to 1,000, but be careful of dead zones with skulls where you can win nothing.

You can also choose the number of lines from 8 to 16; basically, the number of pathways the ball can use to drop towards the multipliers. Moreover, you can toggle the “fast mode” option on the top right of the game so you can see the result more quickly.

Roobet Roulette

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $3,000,000

Roobet Roulette takes the traditional game of chance and makes it more fun in this variation by adding a jackpot feature called “Triple Roo Jackpot” while keeping the gameplay simple. All you need to do is predict where the ball will figuratively land once the wheel spins. However, unlike the usual roulette, you have simpler bet options with the following payouts:

  • Red Diamond and Star: 2x
  • Black Diamond and Star: 2x
  • Red and Black Star: 7x
  • Green Roo Kangaroo logo: 14x

The graphics in Roobet Roulette are simple since the wheel is designed vertically, and once the game starts, it spins in the same direction until it stops on a specific shape/colour. Additionally, the game is more fun since there’s a chance to win the jackpot whenever a green Roobet logo appears in 3 consecutive rounds. If you bet on this logo in any of the 3 rounds and the jackpot is won, you can share the jackpot alongside other players who placed their wagers on green within these 3 rounds. If no one has won the jackpot, it will continuously increase in each round.

Roobet Towers

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $20,000

Max. profit - $3,000,000

If you want to take your chances of getting increasing multipliers, Roobet Towers is for you! It’s similar to the Mines game except it’s vertical, making you feel like you’re climbing a tower of multipliers. However, to safely ascend to the highest multiplier, you need to carefully choose the safe tiles since there are hidden bombs that can end your game quickly and make you lose your potential payout.

Take note that you don’t have to reach the end of the tower, since as long as you don’t encounter detonating bombs, you can cash out any time. Additionally, you can adjust the difficulty level of the game into Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert, and Crazy whenever you want since the higher the difficulty, the bigger the multipliers but also the risk.

Roobet Coin Flip

Min. bet - $0.01

Max. bet - $200,000

Max. profit - $384,000

One of the best chance-based games here is Roobet Coin Flip since the goal is simple: choose which side of the coin will appear on top. Unlike regular coin flips, where your options are heads or tails, the two sides here are the purple Roobet logo and a purple hat.

Roobet has made the game more fun by allowing players to wager on 1, 2, 5, or 10 games at once. This can be set up on top of the game, but if you play multiple games at once, the same bet size and side of the coin will be chosen for all of them. Once you’ve chosen the number of games and bet, click “Create game”, and the game will start. Here, you can play against other players or choose a bot to make a call opposite the bet you placed.

How to play Roobet casino games

To take your first step towards playing Roobet casino games, you need to do the following:

  1. Click the yellow “Register” button in the top right corner.
  2. Choose to create an account via:
  • Manually creating an account.
  • Connecting your:
    • Google account
    • Metamask account
  1. Once you’ve chosen an option, follow the instructions on the screen, whether that’s to:
  • For manual creation: Input your preferred email address, username, and password. Once done, check the box confirming you’re over 18 years old and that you’ve read the terms and conditions.
  • Connect your account: Sign in using your account on your preferred platform to connect it to a Roobet account.
  1. Click “Play Now” to confirm registration of your account.
  2. Once you’re done, you can deposit real money into your account, whether you want to play using fiat or cryptocurrency options.
  3. Next, you finally experience casino betting at Roobet by choosing among the Roobet Originals games you want to play!

Roobet Originals: Why you need to play them

Crypto casino originals games offer more than just a unique experience—they allow you to see how much brands like Roobet take care of our players by curating games that cater exactly to their community. This means there are many advantages to playing them besides having a low house edge and a fun mode, like:

Mobile-optimised

One of the best incentives of betting at Roobet is that the platform is optimised for mobile gambling. This means it’s not just secure but also has a user-friendly interface that makes crypto betting more convenient. Whether you use iOS or Android, you can easily load Roobet on your phone and start playing, no matter where or when.

Loyalty & VIP program

Once you’ve registered an account, you’re automatically part of Roobet’s Loyalty Program. There are different ranks and bonuses you can get the more you level up, allowing you to get fun bonuses to boost your gameplay. If you keep playing and you get invited to the VIP program, you can get exclusive access to VIP tournaments, events, and different promotions and rakeback boosts. No need to just play to win at Roobet since you can also enjoy a fantastic and immersive experience here!

Fiat and crypto options

Want to place your wagers using fiat or cryptocurrency? Roobet, as a computing platform for casino games and sports betting, makes it easier for you since you can do both! You can place your wagers on numerous fiat and cryptocurrency options, as you can see below: Fiat

Tips and strategies for playing Roobet gambling games

If you want to increase your chances of winning when you play Roobet games, you need to strategise rather than just leaving your bets up to Lady Luck. To do so, here are a couple of tips to improve your chances:

Use the fun mode

Take advantage of the fun mode on Roobet Originals games to practice prior to staking real money. This way, you will have an easier time understanding the game mechanics, including the game volatility, making it easier to create a strategy and increase the probability of a successful wager. To use fun mode, wager less than $0.01 and click “Play Demo” to start. However, make sure the game has a fun mode, as not all Roobet Originals offer it.

Do your research

There are different Roobet Originals games available, and depending on which one you want to play, you need to do your research accordingly. Doing so allows you to better understand the game and even learn strategies that veteran players have shared. For example, Dice games are generally considered the best option for using mathematical betting systems like the Martingale or D’Alembert methods. This is because you can adjust the win probability yourself by setting the roll of the dice, which isn’t possible in other games.

Set a strict bankroll

To avoid overspending, you need to establish a betting fund and adhere to it. Keep in mind that while you play for fun, you need to consider responsible gambling measures to avoid chasing losses.

Roobet Originals: Explore the best Roobet games now

Make the best of your cryptocurrency betting experience now by playing the best Roobet games here when you register. Whether you prefer table game classics or crash-based games, Roobet games have been carefully curated to provide fast, fantastic, and secure gameplay.

Getting started with playing casino games while responsible gambling here is easy. Just create an account, login, and make a deposit in your favourite currency. Once you’re done, join in on the fun by choosing the right Roobet Originals game to play!

Frequently Asked Questions

Are Roobet Games safe and legal to play?

Yes, Roobet Games are safe and legal to play since they were made with partnered world-class software providers. This means the games undergo rigorous third-party audits and regulatory checks to ensure they’re fair, secure, and safe before they were launched.

Can I play Roobet Games on mobile devices?

Yes, Roobet Games are optimised for mobile gaming. Just load the website on your preferred browser and start playing.

Are Roobet Games provably fair?

Yes, Roobet Games are provably fair so you can verify each record directly to know that they’re completely random.

Is there a practice or fun mode for trying Roobet Games before betting real money?

Yes, certain Roobet Games have demo modes that you can use to try the game first and learn how it works. This is available in Roobet Originals’ Crash, Keno, Dice, Plinko, Towers, and Coinflip. If you play with a bet of less than $0.01, it automatically enters the demo and you can practice as much as you want.

What are the best Roobet games to play?

While all Roobet Originals games are great, it depends on your playstyle which one you’d prefer. If you’re a fan of the classic table games, then Roobet’s Roulette is the best option, but if you want games with innovative twists, then games like Mission Uncrossable and Towers might be the right ones for you!

How do I start playing Roobet Originals with cryptocurrency?

To start, choose from the available crypto that you want to use. Then, click deposit and follow the instructions. Once your account has funds, go to the Roobet Originals game you want to play and start betting!
